invariants: The North Star protocol version must be explicit.
Agent Analyze requires a passing complexity admission proposal before it can pass.
L4 requires explicit confirmation, original-data reload, preflight snapshot, rollback, and post-change verification.
A specification cannot grant network, secrets, arbitrary MCP, file export, web, ERP, or direct Agent-to-Agent delegation.
Analyze may reject or freeze; it cannot widen a specification.
Converge produces a shadow result or promotion candidate; it never edits the core Harness automatically.
